title: Enable direct app integration and interaction on Main Board View

posts.author: MiguelAngel (Miguel Angel Garcia Gomez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Summary
Apps can be integrated into various locations within monday boards, such as by creating a new view or adding them as a group menu feature.

The Problem
Despite the multiple locations where apps can be added, they currently cannot be added directly to function on the main board.

The Use Case
An app could enhance and modify the main board view in some way.

The Suggestion
Allowing apps to be added directly to the main board view would be beneficial, enabling them to interact with and modify it.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @MiguelAngel for the feature request!!
